# Unblocked Games Website

## Project Overview
This is a collection of unblocked games that can be played directly in the browser without restrictions. The site includes Snake, Flappy Bird, 2048, Tic Tac Toe, and a Memory Game.

## Technology Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Vanilla JavaScript
- No backend required

## Project Structure
```
/
├── index.html          # Main landing page
├── styles.css          # Main stylesheet
├── games/
│   ├── snake.html      # Snake game
│   ├── flappy.html     # Flappy Bird
│   ├── 2048.html       # 2048 game
│   ├── tictactoe.html  # Tic Tac Toe
│   └── memory.html     # Memory matching game
├── README.md
└── .github/
    └── copilot-instructions.md
```

## Setup Instructions
1. Open index.html in a web browser
2. Click on any game to start playing
3. Use browser back button or menu to return to home

## Games Included
- **Snake**: Classic snake game with arrow keys
- **Flappy Bird**: Tap to fly through obstacles
- **2048**: Combine tiles to reach 2048
- **Tic Tac Toe**: Play against the computer
- **Memory Game**: Match all pairs
